description_long: This is a compact, futuristic rifle with a robust, angular body and a matte black finish. The weapon features a short, thick barrel with a prominent muzzle opening and a squared-off front end, suggesting a design optimized for close-quarters urban combat. The magazine is curved and integrated into the lower receiver, with a double-stack appearance, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. The upper receiver has a series of small, evenly spaced ridges, possibly for heat dissipation or mounting accessories. There are no visible external sights or optics, and the stock is minimal, resembling a pistol grip configuration. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for weight reduction and durability.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a thick barrel, curved magazine, and pistol grip stock, designed for close-quarters use. The body is angular and robust, with no visible external sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the thick barrel, curved magazine, and angular body details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large muzzle opening and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with the magazine and grip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the minimal stock, emphasizing the weapon's compactness.
